{{Quote|So before I lop your head off, I have one question: be ye friend or foe of the Republic?|Dragite|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids">''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]''</ref>}}
'''Dragite''' was an [[Iron Knight]] and [[High Marshal]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. He became one of the many Iron Knights to guard [[Dweem]] when [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Aqinos]] and the rest of the Iron Knights were excommunicated by the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]'' {{1st}}
